name: Ubiquiti Camera G6 Turret Black
title: Ubiquiti Camera G6 Turret Black | Getic
title_extended: Ubiquiti Camera G6 Turret Black - 4K AI Camera, 8MP, IP66
short_description: The UVC-G6-Turret-B is equipped with a 1/1.8" 8MP CMOS sensor, delivering ultra-high-definition 4K video at 3840 x 2160 resolution.
description: Buy Ubiquiti Camera G6 Turret Black. Price from 192.99 USD. Worldwide delivery! Full description, specifications, reviews, extended warranty option. ☎ +371 60 000 888.

detailed_description.heading: High-Resolution 4K AI Camera
detailed_description.text: The UVC-G6-Turret-B is equipped with a 1/1.8" 8MP CMOS sensor, delivering ultra-high-definition 4K video at 3840 x 2160 resolution. Its fixed focal length lens provides a wide field of view: horizontal 109.9°, vertical 56.7°, and diagonal 134.1°, ensuring comprehensive area coverage. The camera supports a maximum frame rate of 30 FPS, capturing smooth and detailed footage. Advanced image settings include brightness, contrast, sharpness, saturation, white balance, exposure control, 2D and 3D noise reduction, motion-based noise reduction, masking, text overlay, and HDR, allowing for precise image optimization in various lighting conditions.

detailed_description.heading: AI-Powered Security and Night Vision
detailed_description.text: Leveraging AI technology, the G6 Turret camera offers intelligent event detection capabilities, including recognition of people, vehicles, animals, faces, and license plates. This enhances security monitoring by providing accurate and timely alerts. The camera features built-in infrared (IR) LEDs with an automatic IR cut filter, enabling clear night vision up to 30 meters. This ensures reliable surveillance in low-light or complete darkness, maintaining high image quality around the clock. Its AI-driven analytics reduce false alarms by distinguishing between relevant and irrelevant motion events, thereby optimizing system performance and response accuracy. This makes it ideal for high-security environments that demand precision and uninterrupted situational awareness.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Construction and Flexible Installation
detailed_description.text: Designed for outdoor use, the UVC-G6-Turret-B boasts an IP66-rated weatherproof enclosure, protecting it against dust and heavy rain. Its IK04 impact resistance rating ensures durability against vandalism. The camera operates reliably in temperatures ranging from -30°C to 50°C and humidity levels up to 90% (non-condensing). It supports Power over Ethernet (PoE) with a voltage range of 37–57V DC and a maximum power consumption of 12.5W. Mounting options include ceiling and wall installations, with additional accessories available for arm, pendant, or junction box mounting, providing flexibility for various deployment scenarios.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Integration and Compliance
detailed_description.text: The G6 Turret integrates seamlessly with the UniFi Protect application suite, offering centralized management and real-time monitoring through web and mobile platforms. It features a 10/100 Mbps Ethernet interface for network connectivity and includes a built-in microphone for audio recording. The camera's firmware supports advanced features such as HDR imaging and smart detection analytics, enhancing situational awareness. Compliance with NDAA regulations ensures suitability for government and enterprise deployments. The package includes the camera unit, mounting hardware, and installation guide, facilitating straightforward setup and integration into existing security systems.
